mapper.sql:
a.account_id AS trainer_account_id, a.name AS name, a.region AS region, u.gender AS gender, u.hati_code AS hati_code,
u.intro AS intro, mf.url AS profile_image,
tpp.price AS price, tpp.total_count AS total_count,
NVL(tb.cnt, 0) AS bookmark_count,
CASE WHEN tb_me.trainer_account_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS bookmarked

FROM accounts a JOIN user_profile u ON u.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN trainer_pass_product tpp ON tpp.account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT trainer_account_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM trainer_booking GROUP BY trainer_account_id ) tb ON tb.trainer_account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT trainer_account_id FROM trainer_booking WHERE user_account_id = #{loginAccountId} GROUP BY trainer_account_id ) tb_me ON tb_me.trainer_account_id = a.account_id
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ref_id, url FROM ( SELECT ref_id, url, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY ref_id ORDER BY created_at DESC ) rn FROM media_files WHERE ref_type = 'PROFILE' ) WHERE rn = 1 ) mf ON mf.ref_id = a.account_id

sql.if: AND ( LOWER(a.name || ' 트레이너') LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR a.region LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR LOWER(u.nickname) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR LOWER(u.handle) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR u.hati_code LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR LOWER(u.intro) LIKE '%' || LOWER(#{keyword}) || '%' )

if.test: gender != null and gender != '' and gender != 'ALL'

mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.score DESC, t.bookmark_count DESC, t.trainer_account_id DESC) rn FROM ( SELECT ,
( /* 기본 인기 조금 */ NVL(tb.cnt, 0) + /* HATI 같으면 +100 */ (CASE WHEN #{loginAccountId} IS NOT NULL AND u.hati_code = (SELECT u2.hati_code FROM user_profile u2 WHERE u2.account_id = #{loginAccountId}) THEN 100 ELSE 0 END) + /* 지역 같으면 +50 */ (CASE WHEN #{loginAccountId} IS NOT NULL AND a.region = (SELECT a2.region FROM accounts a2 WHERE a2.account_id = #{loginAccountId}) THEN 50 ELSE 0 END) )
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= SYSDATE - 7)
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))
NVL(tb.cnt, 0)
AS score
WHERE
) t ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= #{offset} + #{limit}

SELECT
WHERE
AND u.hati_code = ( SELECT u2.hati_code FROM user_profile u2 WHERE u2.account_id = #{loginAccountId} ) AND a.region = ( SELECT a2.region FROM accounts a2 WHERE a2.account_id = #{loginAccountId} )
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY bookmark_count DESC, trainer_account_id DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.price IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.price ASC, t.bookmark_count DESC, t.trainer_account_id DESC
ORDER BY CASE WHEN t.price IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.price DESC, t.bookmark_count DESC, t.trainer_account_id DESC
ORDER BY t.bookmark_count DESC, t.trainer_account_id DESC
) rn FROM ( SELECT ,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= SYSDATE - 7)
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -1))
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trainer_booking x WHERE x.trainer_account_id = a.account_id AND x.created_at >= ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE, -12))
NVL(tb.cnt, 0)
AS popular_count
WHERE
) t ) WHERE rn > #{offset} AND rn <= #{offset} + #{limit}
